fullOutput:
<path>/Users/rene/Develop/opencode/ferienwohnung/styles.css</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: /* ─── TOKENS ─── */
2: :root {
3:   --bg:           #f5f2ed;
4:   --surface:      #fffefb;
5:   --text:         #1a1814;
6:   --muted:        #6b635b;
7:   --subtle:       #b5a99e;
8:   --brand:        #c24f2c;
9:   --brand-dark:   #9d3f23;
10:   --brand-light:  #f9ede8;
11:   --line:         #e8e0d6;
12:   --radius-sm:    10px;
13:   --radius-md:    18px;
14:   --radius-lg:    24px;
15:   --shadow-sm:    0 2px 8px rgba(40,24,10,.06);
16:   --shadow-md:    0 8px 28px rgba(40,24,10,.10);
17:   --shadow-lg:    0 20px 60px rgba(40,24,10,.14);
18: }
19: 
20: /* ─── RESET ─── */
21: *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
22: 
23: html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
24: 
25: body {
26:   font-family: "DM Sans", system-ui, sans-serif;
27:   font-size: 1rem;
28:   line-height: 1.6;
29:   color: var(--text);
30:   background: var(--bg);
31:   -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
32: }
33: 
34: img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
35: a   { color: inherit; }
36: 
37: h1, h2, h3 {
38:   font-family: "Fraunces", Georgia, serif;
39:   line-height: 1.15;
40: }
41: 
42: /* ─── TOPBAR ─── */
43: .topbar {
44:   position: sticky;
45:   top: 0;
46:   z-index: 30;
47:   display: flex;
48:   align-items: center;
49:   justify-content: space-between;
50:   gap: 1rem;
51:   padding: 0 clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 3rem);
52:   height: 64px;
53:   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
54:   background: rgba(245, 242, 237, 0.9);
55:   backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
56: }
57: 
58: .brand {
59:   font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
60:   font-size: 1.15rem;
61:   font-weight: 600;
62:   text-decoration: none;
63:   white-space: nowrap;
64: }
65: 
66: .menu {
67:   display: flex;
68:   gap: 0.25rem;
69: }
70: 
71: .menu a {
72:   padding: 0.4rem 0.75rem;
73:   border-radius: 999px;
74:   font-size: 0.9rem;
75:   color: var(--muted);
76:   text-decoration: none;
77:   transition: background 150ms, color 150ms;
78: }
79: 
80: .menu a:hover {
81:   background: var(--line);
82:   color: var(--text);
83: }
84: 
85: .cta {
86:   display: inline-flex;
87:   align-items: center;
88:   padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem;
89:   border-radius: 999px;
90:   background: var(--brand);
91:   color: #fff;
92:   font-size: 0.9rem;
93:   font-weight: 600;
94:   text-decoration: none;
95:   white-space: nowrap;
96:   transition: background 150ms;
97: }
98: 
99: .cta:hover { background: var(--brand-dark); }
100: 
101: /* ─── LAYOUT WRAPPER ─── */
102: main {
103:   max-width: 1140px;
104:   margin: 0 auto;
105:   padding: 2.5rem clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2.5rem) 0;
106:   display: flex;
107:   flex-direction: column;
108:   gap: 1.5rem;
109: }
110: 
111: /* ─── HERO ─── */
112: .hero {
113:   display: grid;
114:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 480px;
115:   gap: 1.5rem;
116:   align-items: stretch;
117: }
118: 
119: .hero-image {
120:   position: relative;
121:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
122:   overflow: hidden;
123:   min-height: 420px;
124:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
125: }
126: 
127: .hero-image img {
128:   height: 100%;
129:   object-position: center 60%;
130: }
131: 
132: .hero-badge {
133:   position: absolute;
134:   bottom: 1.25rem;
135:   left: 1.25rem;
136:   display: flex;
137:   align-items: center;
138:   gap: 0.5rem;
139:   padding: 0.5rem 0.9rem;
140:   border-radius: 999px;
141:   background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92);
142:   backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
143:   font-size: 0.85rem;
144:   font-weight: 600;
145:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
146: }
147: 
148: .stars { color: #e8a020; letter-spacing: -1px; }
149: 
150: .hero-content {
151:   background: var(--surface);
152:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
153:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
154:   padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);
155:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
156:   display: flex;
157:   flex-direction: column;
158: }
159: 
160: .eyebrow {
161:   font-size: 0.72rem;
162:   font-weight: 700;
163:   letter-spacing: 0.1em;
164:   text-transform: uppercase;
165:   color: var(--brand-dark);
166:   margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
167: }
168: 
169: h1 {
170:   font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 3.5vw, 2.7rem);
171:   font-weight: 700;
172:   margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
173: }
174: 
175: .hero-sub {
176:   color: var(--muted);
177:   font-size: 1.05rem;
178:   margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
179: }
180: 
181: .hero-stats {
182:   display: flex;
183:   align-items: center;
184:   gap: 0;
185:   padding: 1rem 0;
186:   border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
187:   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
188:   margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
189: }
190: 
191: .stat {
192:   flex: 1;
193:   display: flex;
194:   flex-direction: column;
195:   align-items: center;
196:   gap: 0.15rem;
197: }
198: 
199: .stat strong {
200:   font-size: 1.15rem;
201:   font-weight: 700;
202: }
203: 
204: .stat span {
205:   font-size: 0.75rem;
206:   color: var(--muted);
207:   text-align: center;
208: }
209: 
210: .stat-divider {
211:   width: 1px;
212:   height: 32px;
213:   background: var(--line);
214: }
215: 
216: .hero-actions {
217:   display: flex;
218:   flex-direction: column;
219:   gap: 0.7rem;
220:   margin-top: auto;
221: }
222: 
223: .button {
224:   display: inline-flex;
225:   align-items: center;
226:   justify-content: center;
227:   padding: 0.75rem 1.4rem;
228:   border-radius: 999px;
229:   font-size: 0.95rem;
230:   font-weight: 600;
231:   text-decoration: none;
232:   text-align: center;
233:   transition: all 160ms ease;
234:   border: 1.5px solid transparent;
235: }
236: 
237: .button.primary {
238:   background: var(--brand);
239:   color: #fff;
240: }
241: 
242: .button.primary:hover { background: var(--brand-dark); }
243: 
244: .button.secondary {
245:   background: transparent;
246:   border-color: var(--line);
247:   color: var(--text);
248: }
249: 
250: .button.secondary:hover { background: var(--line); }
251: 
252: /* ─── HIGHLIGHTS ─── */
253: .highlights {
254:   display: grid;
255:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
256:   gap: 1rem;
257: }
258: 
259: .highlight-card {
260:   background: var(--surface);
261:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
262:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
263:   padding: 1.4rem;
264:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
265:   transition: box-shadow 200ms, transform 200ms;
266: }
267: 
268: .highlight-card:hover {
269:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
270:   transform: translateY(-2px);
271: }
272: 
273: .hi-icon {
274:   width: 42px;
275:   height: 42px;
276:   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
277:   background: var(--brand-light);
278:   display: flex;
279:   align-items: center;
280:   justify-content: center;
281:   margin-bottom: 1rem;
282: }
283: 
284: .hi-icon svg {
285:   width: 20px;
286:   height: 20px;
287:   color: var(--brand-dark);
288: }
289: 
290: .highlight-card h3 {
291:   font-size: 1rem;
292:   font-weight: 600;
293:   margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
294: }
295: 
296: .highlight-card p {
297:   font-size: 0.9rem;
298:   color: var(--muted);
299: }
300: 
301: /* ─── SECTION BASE ─── */
302: .section {
303:   background: var(--surface);
304:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
305:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
306:   padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
307:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
308: }
309: 
310: .section-label {
311:   font-size: 0.72rem;
312:   font-weight: 700;
313:   letter-spacing: 0.1em;
314:   text-transform: uppercase;
315:   color: var(--brand-dark);
316:   margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
317: }
318: 
319: .section h2 {
320:   font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.5vw, 2rem);
321:   margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
322: }
323: 
324: /* ─── AMENITY GRID ─── */
325: .amenity-grid {
326:   display: grid;
327:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
328:   gap: 0.75rem;
329: }
330: 
331: .amenity {
332:   display: flex;

334:   gap: 0.75rem;
335:   padding: 1rem;
336:   border: 1px solid var(--line);

338:   background: var(--bg);
339: }
340: 
341: .amenity svg {
342:   flex-shrink: 0;
343:   width: 20px;
344:   height: 20px;
345:   margin-top: 2px;
346:   color: var(--brand-dark);
347: }
348: 
349: .amenity div {
350:   display: flex;
351:   flex-direction: column;
352:   gap: 0.15rem;
353: }
354: 
355: .amenity strong {
356:   font-size: 0.88rem;
357:   font-weight: 600;
358: }
359: 
360: .amenity span {
361:   font-size: 0.8rem;
362:   color: var(--muted);
363: }
364: 
365: /* ─── LAGE ─── */
366: .lage-section {
367:   display: grid;
368:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
369:   gap: 2.5rem;
370:   align-items: center;
371:   padding: 0;
372:   overflow: hidden;
373: }
374: 
375: .lage-text {
376:   padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
377: }
378: 
379: .lage-text h2 { margin-bottom: 0.9rem; }
380: 
381: .lage-text p {
382:   color: var(--muted);
383:   margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
384: }
385: 
386: .checklist {
387:   list-style: none;
388:   display: flex;
389:   flex-direction: column;
390:   gap: 0.6rem;
391: }
392: 
393: .checklist li {
394:   display: flex;
395:   align-items: center;
396:   gap: 0.65rem;
397:   font-size: 0.95rem;
398: }
399: 
400: .checklist svg {
401:   flex-shrink: 0;
402:   width: 16px;
403:   height: 16px;
404:   color: var(--brand);
405: }
406: 
407: .lage-image {
408:   height: 100%;
409:   min-height: 320px;
410: }
411: 
412: .lage-image img {
413:   height: 100%;
414:   object-position: center center;
415: }
416: 
417: /* ─── GALLERY ─── */
418: .gallery {
419:   display: grid;
420:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
421:   gap: 0.75rem;
422:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
423:   overflow: hidden;
424: }
425: 
426: .gallery img {
427:   height: 200px;
428:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
429:   transition: transform 300ms ease, box-shadow 300ms;
430:   cursor: pointer;

432: 
433: .gallery img:hover {
434:   transform: scale(1.02);
435:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
436:   z-index: 1;
437:   position: relative;
438: }
439: 
440: /* ─── CONTACT BANNER ─── */
441: .contact-banner {
442:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
443:   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1814 0%, #2e231b 60%, #3d2b1f 100%);
444:   padding: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
445:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
446:   color: #fff;
447: }
448: 
449: .contact-inner {
450:   display: flex;
451:   align-items: center;
452:   justify-content: space-between;
453:   gap: 2rem;
454: }
455: 
456: .contact-text h2 {
457:   font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 2.8vw, 2.2rem);
458:   margin-bottom: 0.6rem;

460: }
461: 
462: .contact-text p {
463:   color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);

465: }
466: 
467: .contact-actions {
468:   display: flex;

473: 
474: .contact-link {
475:   display: inline-flex;

478:   padding: 0.85rem 1.4rem;
479:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
480:   font-weight: 600;
481:   font-size: 0.95rem;

485: }
486: 
487: .contact-link svg {
488:   width: 18px;
489:   height: 18px;

491: }
492: 
493: .contact-link.email {
494:   background: var(--brand);
495:   color: #fff;
496: }
497: 
498: .contact-link.email:hover { background: var(--brand-dark); }
499: 
500: .contact-link.phone {
501:   background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
502:   color: #fff;
503:   border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
504: }
505: 
506: .contact-link.phone:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); }
507: 
508: /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
509: footer {
510:   max-width: 1140px;
511:   margin: 2.5rem auto 0;
512:   padding: 2rem clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2.5rem);
513:   border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
514:   display: flex;
515:   justify-content: space-between;
516:   align-items: center;
517:   color: var(--muted);
518:   font-size: 0.875rem;
519:   gap: 1rem;
520:   flex-wrap: wrap;
521: }
522: 
523: .footer-sub { color: var(--subtle); }
524: 
525: /* ─── BESCHREIBUNG ─── */
526: .description-section {
527:   display: grid;
528:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
529:   gap: 2rem;
530:   align-items: start;
531: }
532: 
533: .desc-text h2 { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
534: 
535: .desc-text p {
536:   color: var(--muted);
537:   margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
538:   font-size: 0.97rem;
539: }
540: 
541: .desc-note {
542:   font-size: 0.82rem !important;
543:   color: var(--subtle) !important;
544:   border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
545:   padding-top: 0.75rem;
546:   margin-top: 0.5rem;
547: }
548: 
549: .desc-images {
550:   display: grid;
551:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
552:   gap: 0.75rem;
553: }
554: 
555: .desc-images img {
556:   height: 180px;
557:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
558:   object-fit: cover;
559: }
560: 
561: /* ─── REVIEWS ─── */
562: .reviews-section {}
563: 
564: .reviews-header {
565:   display: flex;
566:   align-items: flex-start;
567:   justify-content: space-between;
568:   gap: 1.5rem;
569:   margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
570:   flex-wrap: wrap;
571: }
572: 
573: .reviews-header h2 { margin-bottom: 0; }
574: 
575: .rating-summary {
576:   display: flex;
577:   align-items: center;
578:   gap: 1rem;
579:   flex-shrink: 0;
580: }
581: 
582: .rating-big {
583:   font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
584:   font-size: 3rem;

588: }
589: 
590: .stars-row { color: #e8a020; letter-spacing: 2px; font-size: 1.1rem; }
591: 
592: .rating-sub { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); }
593: 
594: .rating-cats {
595:   display: grid;
596:   grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
597:   gap: 0.5rem;

602: }
603: 
604: .rcat {
605:   display: flex;
606:   flex-direction: column;
607:   align-items: center;
608:   gap: 0.2rem;
609:   text-align: center;
610: }
611: 
612: .rcat span { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted); }
613: .rcat strong { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; }
614: 
615: .reviews-grid {
616:   display: grid;
617:   grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
618:   gap: 1rem;
619: }
620: 
621: .review-card {
622:   background: var(--bg);
623:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
624:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
625:   padding: 1.2rem;
626:   display: flex;
627:   flex-direction: column;
628:   gap: 0.75rem;
629: }
630: 
631: .review-card p {
632:   font-size: 0.9rem;
633:   color: var(--text);
634:   line-height: 1.5;
635:   flex: 1;
636:   font-style: italic;
637: }
638: 
639: .review-card footer {
640:   display: flex;
641:   align-items: center;
642:   gap: 0.5rem;
643:   font-size: 0.82rem;
644: }
645: 
646: .review-card footer strong { font-weight: 600; }
647: .review-card footer span { color: var(--muted); }
648: 
649: /* ─── HAUSREGELN ─── */
650: .rules-grid {
651:   display: grid;
652:   grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
653:   gap: 0.75rem;
654: }
655: 
656: .rule {
657:   display: flex;
658:   align-items: center;
659:   gap: 0.9rem;
660:   padding: 1rem;
661:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
662:   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
663:   background: var(--bg);
664: }
665: 
666: .rule svg {
667:   flex-shrink: 0;
668:   width: 20px;
669:   height: 20px;
670:   color: var(--brand-dark);
671: }
672: 
673: .rule div {
674:   display: flex;
675:   flex-direction: column;
676:   gap: 0.1rem;
677: }
678: 
679: .rule strong { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; }
680: .rule span { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); }
681: 
682: /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─── */
683: @media (max-width: 1024px) {
684:   .amenity-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
685: }
686: 
687: @media (max-width: 860px) {
688:   .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
689:   .hero-image { min-height: 300px; }
690:   .hero-actions { flex-direction: row; }
691:   .highlights { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
692:   .description-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
693:   .lage-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
694:   .lage-image { min-height: 220px; }
695:   .reviews-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
696:   .rating-cats { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
697:   .rules-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
698:   .contact-inner { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
699:   .contact-actions { width: 100%; }
700:   .contact-link { justify-content: center; }
701: }
702: 
703: @media (max-width: 600px) {
704:   .topbar { padding: 0 1rem; }
705:   .menu { display: none; }
706:   .highlights { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
707:   .amenity-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
708:   .gallery { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
709:   .reviews-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
710:   .rating-cats { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
711:   .rules-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
712:   .desc-images { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
713:   footer { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
714: }
